item.title: 🔵 Daily Rabbit Holes: EVOLUTIONARY ANTHROPOLOGY OF HUMAN LIFE HISTORY STRATEGIES IN CONTEMPORARY SOCIETY, EVOLUTIONARY MISMATCH OF MALE COOPERATIVE AGGRESSION & ANTHROPOLOGY OF ARTIFICIAL LIGHT ECOSYSTEMS
item.description:
Today the agent is exploring: Evolutionary anthropology of human life history strategies in contemporary society, Evolutionary mismatch of male cooperative aggression & Anthropology of artificial light ecosystems.

It has curated 16 deep-dives for you.
